<!-- news.dpgazette.com is managing ads with Advanced Ads 2.0.17 – https://wpadvancedads.com/ --><script id="dpgaz-ready">
			/**
 * Wait for the page to be ready before firing JS.
 *
 * @param {function} callback - A callable function to be executed.
 * @param {string} [requestedState=complete] - document.readyState to wait for. Defaults to 'complete', can be 'interactive'.
 */
window.advanced_ads_ready = function ( callback, requestedState ) {
	requestedState = requestedState || 'complete';
	var checkState = function ( state ) {
		return requestedState === 'interactive' ? state !== 'loading' : state === 'complete';
	};

	// If we have reached the correct state, fire the callback.
	if ( checkState( document.readyState ) ) {
		callback();
		return;
	}
	// We are not yet in the correct state, attach an event handler, only fire once if the requested state is 'interactive'.
	document.addEventListener( 'readystatechange', function ( event ) {
		if ( checkState( event.target.readyState ) ) {
			callback();
		}
	}, {once: requestedState === 'interactive'} );
};

window.advanced_ads_ready_queue = window.advanced_ads_ready_queue || [];
		</script>

:root :where(.wp-block-pullquote){font-size: 1.5em;line-height: 1.6;}
/*# sourceURL=global-styles-inline-css */
</style>

<meta name="generator" content="Site Kit by Google 1.172.0" /><meta name="facebook-domain-verification" content="n5ox4uea5l4vyvo0ephnut2qjpwllw" /><meta name="onesignal-plugin" content="wordpress-3.8.0">
  <script src="https://cdn.onesignal.com/sdks/web/v16/OneSignalSDK.page.js" defer></script>
  <script>
          window.OneSignalDeferred = window.OneSignalDeferred || [];
          OneSignalDeferred.push(async function(OneSignal) {
            await OneSignal.init({
              appId: "ba91005c-6473-4a19-85e1-dfea94c8e1c4",
              serviceWorkerOverrideForTypical: true,
              path: "https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/plugins/onesignal-free-web-push-notifications/sdk_files/",
              serviceWorkerParam: { scope: "/wp-content/plugins/onesignal-free-web-push-notifications/sdk_files/push/onesignal/" },
              serviceWorkerPath: "OneSignalSDKWorker.js",
            });
          });

          // Unregister the legacy OneSignal service worker to prevent scope conflicts
          if (navigator.serviceWorker) {
            navigator.serviceWorker.getRegistrations().then((registrations) => {
              // Iterate through all registered service workers
              registrations.forEach((registration) => {
                // Check the script URL to identify the specific service worker
                if (registration.active && registration.active.scriptURL.includes('OneSignalSDKWorker.js.php')) {
                  // Unregister the service worker
                  registration.unregister().then((success) => {
                    if (success) {
                      console.log('OneSignalSW: Successfully unregistered:', registration.active.scriptURL);
                    } else {
                      console.log('OneSignalSW: Failed to unregister:', registration.active.scriptURL);
                    }
                  });
                }
              });
            }).catch((error) => {
              console.error('Error fetching service worker registrations:', error);
            });
        }
        </script>

				} else {

				</div>
				</div>
		<style id="loop-dynamic-22248">.e-loop-item-22567 .elementor-element.elementor-element-79d358a:not(.elementor-motion-effects-element-type-background), .e-loop-item-22567 .elementor-element.elementor-element-79d358a > .elementor-motion-effects-container > .elementor-motion-effects-layer{background-image:url("https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/IMG_0037.jpeg");}</style>		<div data-elementor-type="loop-item" data-elementor-id="22248" class="elementor elementor-22248 swiper-slide e-loop-item e-loop-item-22567 post-22567 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-featured category-obituaries tag-susan-g-emry post_format-post-format-standard authored-by-press-release" data-elementor-post-type="elementor_library" role="group" aria-roledescription="slide" data-custom-edit-handle="1">
			<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-79d358a e-flex e-con-boxed e-con e-child" data-id="79d358a" data-element_type="container" data-settings="{&quot;background_background&quot;:&quot;classic&quot;,&quot;jet_parallax_layout_list&quot;:[]}">

		<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-861c28c e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="861c28c" data-element_type="container" data-settings="{&quot;jet_parallax_layout_list&quot;:[]}">

</ul></div>
</li>
<li id="jet-mega-menu-item-5158" class="jet-mega-menu-item jet-mega-menu-item-type-custom jet-mega-menu-item-object-custom jet-mega-menu-item-has-children jet-mega-menu-item--default jet-mega-menu-item--top-level jet-mega-menu-item-5158"><div class="jet-mega-menu-item__inner" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-haspopup="true" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="About Us"><a href="#" class="jet-mega-menu-item__link jet-mega-menu-item__link--top-level"><div class="jet-mega-menu-item__title"><div class="jet-mega-menu-item__label">About Us</div></div></a><div class="jet-mega-menu-item__dropdown"><i class="fas fa-angle-down"></i></div></div>
<div class='jet-mega-menu-sub-menu'><ul  class="jet-mega-menu-sub-menu__list">
	<li id="jet-mega-menu-item-7153" class="jet-mega-menu-item jet-mega-menu-item-type-post_type jet-mega-menu-item-object-page jet-mega-menu-item--default jet-mega-menu-item--sub-level jet-mega-menu-item-7153"><div class="jet-mega-menu-item__inner"><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/advertising/" class="jet-mega-menu-item__link jet-mega-menu-item__link--sub-level"><div class="jet-mega-menu-item__title"><div class="jet-mega-menu-item__label">Advertising</div></div></a></div></li>
	<li id="jet-mega-menu-item-10523" class="jet-mega-menu-item jet-mega-menu-item-type-post_type jet-mega-menu-item-object-page jet-mega-menu-item--default jet-mega-menu-item--sub-level jet-mega-menu-item-10523"><div class="jet-mega-menu-item__inner"><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/becoming-a-contributor/" class="jet-mega-menu-item__link jet-mega-menu-item__link--sub-level"><div class="jet-mega-menu-item__title"><div class="jet-mega-menu-item__label">Becoming A Contributor</div></div></a></div></li>
	<li id="jet-mega-menu-item-6245" class="jet-mega-menu-item jet-mega-menu-item-type-post_type jet-mega-menu-item-object-page jet-mega-menu-item--default jet-mega-menu-item--sub-level jet-mega-menu-item-6245"><div class="jet-mega-menu-item__inner"><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/reprinting-guidelines/" class="jet-mega-menu-item__link jet-mega-menu-item__link--sub-level"><div class="jet-mega-menu-item__title"><div class="jet-mega-menu-item__label">Reprinting Guidelines</div></div></a></div></li>
	<li id="jet-mega-menu-item-19715" class="jet-mega-menu-item jet-mega-menu-item-type-post_type jet-mega-menu-item-object-page jet-mega-menu-item--default jet-mega-menu-item--sub-level jet-mega-menu-item-19715"><div class="jet-mega-menu-item__inner"><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/submit-letter-to-the-editor/" class="jet-mega-menu-item__link jet-mega-menu-item__link--sub-level"><div class="jet-mega-menu-item__title"><div class="jet-mega-menu-item__label">Submit Letter To The Editor</div></div></a></div></li>
</ul></div>
</li>
<li id="jet-mega-menu-item-14" class="jet-mega-menu-item jet-mega-menu-item-type-post_type jet-mega-menu-item-object-page jet-mega-menu-item--default jet-mega-menu-item--top-level jet-mega-menu-item-14"><div class="jet-mega-menu-item__inner"><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/contact-us/" class="jet-mega-menu-item__link jet-mega-menu-item__link--top-level"><div class="jet-mega-menu-item__title"><div class="jet-mega-menu-item__label">Contact Us</div></div></a></div></li>
</ul></nav></div>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-fade726 elementor-widget elementor-widget-jet-ajax-search" data-id="fade726" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-settings="{&quot;results_area_columns&quot;:1}" data-widget_type="jet-ajax-search.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<div class="elementor-jet-ajax-search jet-search">
	<div class="jet_search_listing_grid_hidden_template" style="display: none;">
			</div>

<div class="jet-ajax-search jet-ajax-search--mobile-skin" data-settings="{&quot;symbols_for_start_searching&quot;:2,&quot;search_by_empty_value&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;submit_on_enter&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;search_source&quot;:[&quot;post&quot;,&quot;page&quot;,&quot;business_dir_dir_ltg&quot;,&quot;jobs_dir_ltg&quot;,&quot;mec-events&quot;],&quot;search_logging&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;search_results_url&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;search_taxonomy&quot;:&quot;category&quot;,&quot;include_terms_ids&quot;:[],&quot;exclude_terms_ids&quot;:[],&quot;exclude_posts_ids&quot;:[],&quot;custom_fields_source&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;limit_query&quot;:5,&quot;limit_query_tablet&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;limit_query_mobile&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;limit_query_in_result_area&quot;:25,&quot;results_order_by&quot;:&quot;relevance&quot;,&quot;results_order&quot;:&quot;asc&quot;,&quot;sentence&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;search_in_taxonomy&quot;:&quot;yes&quot;,&quot;search_in_taxonomy_source&quot;:[&quot;category&quot;,&quot;post_tag&quot;,&quot;authored-by&quot;,&quot;photo-by&quot;],&quot;results_area_width_by&quot;:&quot;form&quot;,&quot;results_area_custom_width&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;results_area_custom_position&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;results_area_columns&quot;:1,&quot;results_area_columns_tablet&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;results_area_columns_mobile&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;results_area_columns_mobile_portrait&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;thumbnail_visible&quot;:&quot;yes&quot;,&quot;thumbnail_size&quot;:&quot;thumbnail&quot;,&quot;thumbnail_placeholder&quot;:{&quot;url&quot;:&quot;https:\/\/news.dpgazette.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2025\/06\/placeholder-76.png&quot;,&quot;id&quot;:22240,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;},&quot;post_content_source&quot;:&quot;content&quot;,&quot;post_content_custom_field_key&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;post_content_length&quot;:30,&quot;show_product_price&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;show_product_rating&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;show_add_to_cart&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;show_result_new_tab&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;hig 					<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-4b5a5606 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="4b5a5606" data-element_type="section" data-e-type="section" data-settings="{&quot;jet_parallax_layout_list&quot;:[]}">

						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-597f5006 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="597f5006" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Featured News</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<section class="elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-120307a8 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="120307a8" data-element_type="section" data-e-type="section" data-settings="{&quot;jet_parallax_layout_list&quot;:[]}">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-2940ed41" data-id="2940ed41" data-element_type="column" data-e-type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-42f3c4d0 elementor-grid-2 elementor-posts__hover-none elementor-grid-tablet-2 elementor-grid-mobile-1 elementor-posts--thumbnail-top elementor-widget elementor-widget-posts" data-id="42f3c4d0" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-settings="{&quot;cards_columns&quot;:&quot;2&quot;,&quot;cards_columns_tablet&quot;:&quot;2&quot;,&quot;cards_columns_mobile&quot;:&quot;1&quot;,&quot;cards_row_gap&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:35,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;cards_row_gap_tablet&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;cards_row_gap_mobile&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]}}" data-widget_type="posts.cards">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
							<div class="elementor-posts-container elementor-posts elementor-posts--skin-cards elementor-grid" role="list">
				<article class="elementor-post elementor-grid-item post-22771 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-featured category-obituaries tag-bill-nichols tag-william-charles-nichols post_format-post-format-standard" role="listitem">
			<div class="elementor-post__card">
				<a class="elementor-post__thumbnail__link" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2026/02/bill-nichols/" tabindex="-1" ><div class="elementor-post__thumbnail"><img fetchpriority="high" width="800" height="800" src="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/William-Bill-Nichols-Obit.jpg" class="attachment-large size-large wp-image-22797" alt="" decoding="async" srcset="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/William-Bill-Nichols-Obit.jpg 1000w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/William-Bill-Nichols-Obit-300x300.jpg 300w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/William-Bill-Nichols-Obit-150x150.jpg 150w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/William-Bill-Nichols-Obit-768x768.jpg 768w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/William-Bill-Nichols-Obit-32x32.jpg 32w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/William-Bill-Nichols-Obit-48x48.jpg 48w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/William-Bill-Nichols-Obit-80x80.jpg 80w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/William-Bill-Nichols-Obit-180x180.jpg 180w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/William-Bill-Nichols-Obit-600x600.jpg 600w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/William-Bill-Nichols-Obit-100x100.jpg 100w" sizes="(max-width: 800px) 100vw, 800px" /></div></a>
				<div class="elementor-post__text">
				<h3 class="elementor-post__title">
			<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2026/02/bill-nichols/" >
				Bill Nichols			</a>
		</h3>
				<div class="elementor-post__excerpt">
			<p>William &#8220;Bill&#8221; Nichols, age 90, passed away peacefully on December 28th 2025. He was born in 1935 and lived a long life marked by devotion to family, service to his country, and quiet strength. </p>
		</div>
		
		<a class="elementor-post__read-more" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2026/02/bill-nichols/" aria-label="Read more about Bill Nichols" tabindex="-1" >
			Read More »		</a>

				</div>
				<div class="elementor-post__meta-data">
					<span class="elementor-post-author">
			Press Release		</span>
				<span class="elementor-post-date">
			February 13, 2026		</span>
				</div>
					</div>
		</article>
				<article class="elementor-post elementor-grid-item post-22768 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-featured category-obituaries tag-denette-leeann-march post_format-post-format-standard" role="listitem">
			<div class="elementor-post__card">
				<a class="elementor-post__thumbnail__link" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2026/02/a-life-spectacularly-lived/" tabindex="-1" ><div class="elementor-post__thumbnail"><img width="800" height="800" src="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Denette-Leeann-March-Obit.jpg" class="attachment-large size-large wp-image-22775" alt="" decoding="async" srcset="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Denette-Leeann-March-Obit.jpg 1000w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Denette-Leeann-March-Obit-300x300.jpg 300w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Denette-Leeann-March-Obit-150x150.jpg 150w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Denette-Leeann-March-Obit-768x768.jpg 768w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Denette-Leeann-March-Obit-32x32.jpg 32w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Denette-Leeann-March-Obit-48x48.jpg 48w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Denette-Leeann-March-Obit-80x80.jpg 80w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Denette-Leeann-March-Obit-180x180.jpg 180w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Denette-Leeann-March-Obit-600x600.jpg 600w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Denette-Leeann-March-Obit-100x100.jpg 100w" sizes="(max-width: 800px) 100vw, 800px" /></div></a>
				<div class="elementor-post__text">
				<h3 class="elementor-post__title">
			<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2026/02/a-life-spectacularly-lived/" >
				A life spectacularly lived			</a>
		</h3>
				<div class="elementor-post__excerpt">
			<p>Denette Leeann March was born on 08-21-2002 to Lonnie and Tracy March in Spokane, WA. She grew up in Deer Park, WA where she spent her childhood on her family dairy goat farm and Animal rescue, traveling extensively and enjoying all things school with an influence in FFA, 4-H , and production.  </p>
<p>In all the cracks of Denette’s life from 6 years old to shortly prior to passing she was an avid and passionate concert attendee and traveler, in her short time in this life she traveled to 15 countries with some of her favorites destinations including Ireland, London, Hawaii, Belize, New York, Forks, La Push, Montana, and countless Caribbean islands.</p>
		</div>
		
		<a class="elementor-post__read-more" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2026/02/a-life-spectacularly-lived/" aria-label="Read more about A life spectacularly lived" tabindex="-1" >
			Read More »		</a>

				</div>
				<div class="elementor-post__meta-data">
					<span class="elementor-post-author">
			Press Release		</span>
				<span class="elementor-post-date">
			February 12, 2026		</span>
				</div>
					</div>
		</article>
				</div>
		
						</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
				<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-5b7d66bb elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="5b7d66bb" data-element_type="section" data-e-type="section" data-settings="{&quot;jet_parallax_layout_list&quot;:[]}">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-3f9efb6c" data-id="3f9efb6c" data-element_type="column" data-e-type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<section class="elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-6d98db00 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="6d98db00" data-element_type="section" data-e-type="section" data-settings="{&quot;jet_parallax_layout_list&quot;:[]}">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-25 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-f345013" data-id="f345013" data-element_type="column" data-e-type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-279cfb45 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="279cfb45" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Local News</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-3e9a4b02 elementor-grid-1 elementor-posts__hover-none elementor-grid-tablet-2 elementor-grid-mobile-1 elementor-posts--thumbnail-top elementor-widget elementor-widget-posts" data-id="3e9a4b02" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-settings="{&quot;pagination_type&quot;:&quot;prev_next&quot;,&quot;cards_columns&quot;:&quot;1&quot;,&quot;cards_columns_tablet&quot;:&quot;2&quot;,&quot;cards_columns_mobile&quot;:&quot;1&quot;,&quot;cards_row_gap&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:35,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;cards_row_gap_tablet&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;cards_row_gap_mobile&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]}}" data-widget_type="posts.cards">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
							<div class="elementor-posts-container elementor-posts elementor-posts--skin-cards elementor-grid" role="list">
				<article class="elementor-post elementor-grid-item post-22657 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-letters-to-the-editor tag-roger-kreiger post_format-post-format-standard authored-by-mike-thompson" role="listitem">
			<div class="elementor-post__card">
				<a class="elementor-post__thumbnail__link" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2025/10/letter-to-the-editor-letter-of-support-for-fire-district-4-commissioner-roger-kreiger/" tabindex="-1" ><div class="elementor-post__thumbnail"><img width="768" height="402" src="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/02/Letters-To-The-Editor-large-768x402.png" class="attachment-medium_large size-medium_large wp-image-6888" alt="Typewriter with paper reading &quot;Letters to the Editor&quot;" decoding="async" srcset="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/02/Letters-To-The-Editor-large-768x402.png 768w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/02/Letters-To-The-Editor-large-300x157.png 300w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/02/Letters-To-The-Editor-large-1024x536.png 1024w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/02/Letters-To-The-Editor-large-240x126.png 240w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/02/Letters-To-The-Editor-large-600x314.png 600w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/02/Letters-To-The-Editor-large.png 1200w" sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 768px" /></div></a>
				<div class="elementor-post__text">
				<h2 class="elementor-post__title">
			<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2025/10/letter-to-the-editor-letter-of-support-for-fire-district-4-commissioner-roger-kreiger/" >
				Letter To The Editor &#8211; Letter of Support for Fire District 4 Commissioner Roger Kreiger			</a>
		</h2>
				<div class="elementor-post__excerpt">
			<p>Dear Community Members,</p>
<p>My name is Mike Thompson, and I have been a resident of Spokane County Fire District #4 for 22 years.  During this time, I have had the privilege of serving on the Citizens Advisory Committee, where we review district operations, monitor facilities, and provide input on funding options.</p>
		</div>
		
		<a class="elementor-post__read-more" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2025/10/letter-to-the-editor-letter-of-support-for-fire-district-4-commissioner-roger-kreiger/" aria-label="Read more about Letter To The Editor &#8211; Letter of Support for Fire District 4 Commissioner Roger Kreiger" tabindex="-1" >
			Read More »		</a>

				</div>
				<div class="elementor-post__meta-data">
					<span class="elementor-post-date">
			October 9, 2025		</span>
				</div>
					</div>
		</article>
				</div>
		
				<div class="e-load-more-anchor" data-page="1" data-max-page="527" data-next-page="https://news.dpgazette.com/page/2/"></div>
				<nav class="elementor-pagination" aria-label="Pagination">
			<span class="page-numbers prev">&laquo; Previous</span>
<a class="page-numbers next" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/page/2/">Next &raquo;</a>		</nav>
						</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
				<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-25 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-6a84ddab" data-id="6a84ddab" data-element_type="column" data-e-type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-3968884b elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="3968884b" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">A &amp; E</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-693db4ac elementor-grid-1 elementor-posts__hover-none elementor-grid-tablet-2 elementor-grid-mobile-1 elementor-posts--thumbnail-top elementor-widget elementor-widget-posts" data-id="693db4ac" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-settings="{&quot;pagination_type&quot;:&quot;prev_next&quot;,&quot;cards_columns&quot;:&quot;1&quot;,&quot;cards_columns_tablet&quot;:&quot;2&quot;,&quot;cards_columns_mobile&quot;:&quot;1&quot;,&quot;cards_row_gap&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:35,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;cards_row_gap_tablet&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;cards_row_gap_mobile&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]}}" data-widget_type="posts.cards">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
							<div class="elementor-posts-container elementor-posts elementor-posts--skin-cards elementor-grid" role="list">
				<article class="elementor-post elementor-grid-item post-20521 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-arts-entertainment category-featured tag-north-spokane-library tag-north-spokane-open-mic tag-poetry-slam tag-spokane-county-library-district-scld authored-by-crystal-schut" role="listitem">
			<div class="elementor-post__card">
				<a class="elementor-post__thumbnail__link" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2025/02/north-spokane-open-mic-in-person/" tabindex="-1" ><div class="elementor-post__thumbnail"><img loading="lazy" width="768" height="768" src="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/microphonebackgroundthepeople_webready-768x768.jpg" class="attachment-medium_large size-medium_large wp-image-19090" alt="" decoding="async" srcset="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/microphonebackgroundthepeople_webready-768x768.jpg 768w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/microphonebackgroundthepeople_webready-300x300.jpg 300w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/microphonebackgroundthepeople_webready-150x150.jpg 150w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/microphonebackgroundthepeople_webready-500x500.jpg 500w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/microphonebackgroundthepeople_webready-32x32.jpg 32w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/microphonebackgroundthepeople_webready-48x48.jpg 48w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/microphonebackgroundthepeople_webready-80x80.jpg 80w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/microphonebackgroundthepeople_webready-180x180.jpg 180w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/microphonebackgroundthepeople_webready-600x600.jpg 600w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/microphonebackgroundthepeople_webready-100x100.jpg 100w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/microphonebackgroundthepeople_webready.jpg 1000w" sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 768px" /></div></a>
				<div class="elementor-post__text">
				<h2 class="elementor-post__title">
			<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2025/02/north-spokane-open-mic-in-person/" >
				North Spokane Open Mic In-Person			</a>
		</h2>
				<div class="elementor-post__excerpt">
			<p>Young poets will take center stage at the North Spokane Open Mic. They will share their original work in a supportive and welcoming environment. This event offers high school students a chance to build confidence before entering the world of competitive poetry slams.</p>
		</div>
		
		<a class="elementor-post__read-more" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2025/02/north-spokane-open-mic-in-person/" aria-label="Read more about North Spokane Open Mic In-Person" tabindex="-1" >
			Read More »		</a>

				</div>
				<div class="elementor-post__meta-data">
					<span class="elementor-post-author">
			Crystal Schut		</span>
				<span class="elementor-post-date">
			February 18, 2025		</span>
				</div>
					</div>

						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-5023d5e5 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="5023d5e5" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Business</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-5d5a961a elementor-grid-1 elementor-posts__hover-none elementor-grid-tablet-2 elementor-grid-mobile-1 elementor-posts--thumbnail-top elementor-widget elementor-widget-posts" data-id="5d5a961a" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-settings="{&quot;pagination_type&quot;:&quot;prev_next&quot;,&quot;cards_columns&quot;:&quot;1&quot;,&quot;cards_columns_tablet&quot;:&quot;2&quot;,&quot;cards_columns_mobile&quot;:&quot;1&quot;,&quot;cards_row_gap&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:35,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;cards_row_gap_tablet&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;cards_row_gap_mobile&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]}}" data-widget_type="posts.cards">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
							<div class="elementor-posts-container elementor-posts elementor-posts--skin-cards elementor-grid" role="list">
				<article class="elementor-post elementor-grid-item post-22700 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-business category-featured tag-sixth-avenue-pharmacy tag-the-medicine-shoppe authored-by-editorial-team" role="listitem">
			<div class="elementor-post__card">
				<a class="elementor-post__thumbnail__link" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2025/11/closing-soon-the-medicine-shoppe-in-deer-park/" tabindex="-1" ><div class="elementor-post__thumbnail"><img loading="lazy" width="768" height="502" src="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Crystal-Schut-PXL_20251117_205630694-768x502.webp" class="attachment-medium_large size-medium_large wp-image-22702" alt="" decoding="async" srcset="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Crystal-Schut-PXL_20251117_205630694-768x502.webp 768w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Crystal-Schut-PXL_20251117_205630694-300x196.webp 300w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Crystal-Schut-PXL_20251117_205630694-1024x669.webp 1024w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Crystal-Schut-PXL_20251117_205630694-240x157.webp 240w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Crystal-Schut-PXL_20251117_205630694-600x392.webp 600w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Crystal-Schut-PXL_20251117_205630694.webp 1530w" sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 768px" /></div></a>
				<div class="elementor-post__text">
				<h2 class="elementor-post__title">
			<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2025/11/closing-soon-the-medicine-shoppe-in-deer-park/" >
				Closing Soon The Medicine Shoppe In Deer Park			</a>
		</h2>
				<div class="elementor-post__excerpt">
			<p>The Medicine Shoppe in Deer Park is closing its doors permanently on November 28th due to undisclosed circumstances. All patient prescription files are being automatically transferred to Sixth Avenue Pharmacy in Spokane. Patients will need to contact the new pharmacy to update their payment information, as credit card details could not be transferred.</p>
		</div>
		
		<a class="elementor-post__read-more" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2025/11/closing-soon-the-medicine-shoppe-in-deer-park/" aria-label="Read more about Closing Soon The Medicine Shoppe In Deer Park" tabindex="-1" >
			Read More »		</a>

				</div>
				<div class="elementor-post__meta-data">
					<span class="elementor-post-author">
			Editorial Team		</span>
				<span class="elementor-post-date">
			November 17, 2025		</span>
				</div>
					</div>
		</article>
				</div>

						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-33 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-26b2154" data-id="26b2154" data-element_type="column" data-e-type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-88c391d elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="88c391d" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Animals</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-fb2deaa elementor-grid-1 elementor-posts__hover-none elementor-grid-tablet-2 elementor-grid-mobile-1 elementor-posts--thumbnail-top elementor-widget elementor-widget-posts" data-id="fb2deaa" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-settings="{&quot;pagination_type&quot;:&quot;prev_next&quot;,&quot;cards_columns&quot;:&quot;1&quot;,&quot;cards_columns_tablet&quot;:&quot;2&quot;,&quot;cards_columns_mobile&quot;:&quot;1&quot;,&quot;cards_row_gap&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:35,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;cards_row_gap_tablet&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;cards_row_gap_mobile&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]}}" data-widget_type="posts.cards">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
							<div class="elementor-posts-container elementor-posts elementor-posts--skin-cards elementor-grid" role="list">
				<article class="elementor-post elementor-grid-item post-20681 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-animals category-featured tag-billy-costello tag-bird-flu tag-chickens tag-city-of-deer-park tag-ducks tag-jason-upchurch tag-nick-richardson tag-rabbits tag-tim-verzal tag-tractor-supply authored-by-richard-schut" role="listitem">
			<div class="elementor-post__card">
				<a class="elementor-post__thumbnail__link" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2025/03/a-chicken-egg-problem/" tabindex="-1" ><div class="elementor-post__thumbnail"><img loading="lazy" width="768" height="600" src="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Envato-silkie-chick-in-grass-2024-12-06-22-58-17-utc-768x600.jpg" class="attachment-medium_large size-medium_large wp-image-20682" alt="" decoding="async" srcset="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Envato-silkie-chick-in-grass-2024-12-06-22-58-17-utc-768x600.jpg 768w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Envato-silkie-chick-in-grass-2024-12-06-22-58-17-utc-300x234.jpg 300w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Envato-silkie-chick-in-grass-2024-12-06-22-58-17-utc-1024x799.jpg 1024w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Envato-silkie-chick-in-grass-2024-12-06-22-58-17-utc-231x180.jpg 231w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Envato-silkie-chick-in-grass-2024-12-06-22-58-17-utc-600x468.jpg 600w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Envato-silkie-chick-in-grass-2024-12-06-22-58-17-utc.jpg 1281w" sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 768px" /></div></a>
				<div class="elementor-post__text">
				<h2 class="elementor-post__title">
			<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2025/03/a-chicken-egg-problem/" >
				A Chicken &#038; Egg Problem			</a>
		</h2>
				<div class="elementor-post__excerpt">
			<p>Due to a nationwide egg shortage, Brooke Rollins, the U.S. Secretary of Agriculture appointed by President Trump, suggested on Fox News that one solution could be for some families to raise backyard chickens. This marks the second major egg shortage in the past five years. The first, during the COVID-19 pandemic, was driven by hoarding and delivery disruptions, while the current shortage is primarily due to Bird Flu and industrial farming practice</p>
		</div>
		
		<a class="elementor-post__read-more" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2025/03/a-chicken-egg-problem/" aria-label="Read more about A Chicken &#038; Egg Problem" tabindex="-1" >
			Read More »		</a>

				</div>
				<div class="elementor-post__meta-data">
					<span class="elementor-post-author">
			Richie Schut		</span>
				<span class="elementor-post-date">
			March 18, 2025		</span>
				</div>
					</div>
		</article>
				</div>
		
				<div class="e-load-more-anchor" data-page="1" data-max-page="77" data-next-page="https://news.dpgazette.com/page/2/"></div>
				<nav class="elementor-pagination" aria-label="Pagination">
			<span class="page-numbers prev">&laquo; Previous</span>
<a class="page-numbers next" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/page/2/">Next &raquo;</a>		</nav>
						</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
				<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-33 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-16c23ac" data-id="16c23ac" data-element_type="column" data-e-type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-f5f3c43 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="f5f3c43" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Community</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-9f203af elementor-grid-1 elementor-posts__hover-none elementor-grid-tablet-2 elementor-grid-mobile-1 elementor-posts--thumbnail-top elementor-widget elementor-widget-posts" data-id="9f203af" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-settings="{&quot;pagination_type&quot;:&quot;prev_next&quot;,&quot;cards_columns&quot;:&quot;1&quot;,&quot;cards_columns_tablet&quot;:&quot;2&quot;,&quot;cards_columns_mobile&quot;:&quot;1&quot;,&quot;cards_row_gap&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:35,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;cards_row_gap_tablet&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;cards_row_gap_mobile&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]}}" data-widget_type="posts.cards">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
							<div class="elementor-posts-container elementor-posts elementor-posts--skin-cards elementor-grid" role="list">
				<article class="elementor-post elementor-grid-item post-22749 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-community category-featured tag-dr-miriam-dreewes tag-hometown-animal-hospital tag-pumpkin-lane tag-washington-state-university tag-winterfest-honored-organization authored-by-crystal-schut" role="listitem">
			<div class="elementor-post__card">
				<a class="elementor-post__thumbnail__link" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2026/01/honoring-heart-at-hometown-animal-hospital/" tabindex="-1" ><div class="elementor-post__thumbnail"><img loading="lazy" width="768" height="405" src="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Hometown-Animal-Hospital-Silly-Group-Photo-768x405.webp" class="attachment-medium_large size-medium_large wp-image-22752" alt="" decoding="async" srcset="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Hometown-Animal-Hospital-Silly-Group-Photo-768x405.webp 768w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Hometown-Animal-Hospital-Silly-Group-Photo-300x158.webp 300w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Hometown-Animal-Hospital-Silly-Group-Photo-1024x540.webp 1024w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Hometown-Animal-Hospital-Silly-Group-Photo-1536x811.webp 1536w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Hometown-Animal-Hospital-Silly-Group-Photo-240x127.webp 240w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Hometown-Animal-Hospital-Silly-Group-Photo-600x317.webp 600w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Hometown-Animal-Hospital-Silly-Group-Photo.webp 1895w" sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 768px" /></div></a>
				<div class="elementor-post__text">
				<h2 class="elementor-post__title">
			<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2026/01/honoring-heart-at-hometown-animal-hospital/" >
				Honoring Heart At Hometown Animal Hospital			</a>
		</h2>
				<div class="elementor-post__excerpt">
			<p>Hometown Animal Hospital has been named the 2026 Winterfest Honored Organization, in recognition of years of compassionate service that extends far beyond veterinary care. From rescuing overlooked animals to supporting local events and businesses, the clinic is making a profound impact on the community.</p>
		</div>
		
		<a class="elementor-post__read-more" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2026/01/honoring-heart-at-hometown-animal-hospital/" aria-label="Read more about Honoring Heart At Hometown Animal Hospital" tabindex="-1" >
			Read More »		</a>

				</div>
				<div class="elementor-post__meta-data">
					<span class="elementor-post-author">
			Crystal Schut		</span>
				<span class="elementor-post-date">
			January 15, 2026		</span>
				</div>
					</div>
		</article>
				</div>

			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-2b952b3 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="2b952b3" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Sports</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-9c4b61b elementor-grid-1 elementor-posts__hover-none elementor-grid-tablet-2 elementor-grid-mobile-1 elementor-posts--thumbnail-top elementor-widget elementor-widget-posts" data-id="9c4b61b" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-settings="{&quot;pagination_type&quot;:&quot;prev_next&quot;,&quot;cards_columns&quot;:&quot;1&quot;,&quot;cards_columns_tablet&quot;:&quot;2&quot;,&quot;cards_columns_mobile&quot;:&quot;1&quot;,&quot;cards_row_gap&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:35,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;cards_row_gap_tablet&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;cards_row_gap_mobile&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]}}" data-widget_type="posts.cards">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
							<div class="elementor-posts-container elementor-posts elementor-posts--skin-cards elementor-grid" role="list">
				<article class="elementor-post elementor-grid-item post-20669 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-sports tag-ashlan-bryant tag-berlyn-zimmerer tag-brooklyn-coe tag-deer-park-high-school tag-jacey-boesel tag-lady-stags tag-prosser-mustangs authored-by-t-v-s" role="listitem">
			<div class="elementor-post__card">
				<a class="elementor-post__thumbnail__link" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2025/03/lady-stags-claim-3rd-state-tournament-win-over-prosser/" tabindex="-1" ><div class="elementor-post__thumbnail"><img loading="lazy" width="768" height="768" src="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/Deer-Park-Stags-Basketball-Brand-768x768.jpg" class="attachment-medium_large size-medium_large wp-image-17762" alt="" decoding="async" srcset="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/Deer-Park-Stags-Basketball-Brand-768x768.jpg 768w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/Deer-Park-Stags-Basketball-Brand-300x300.jpg 300w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/Deer-Park-Stags-Basketball-Brand-150x150.jpg 150w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/Deer-Park-Stags-Basketball-Brand-500x500.jpg 500w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/Deer-Park-Stags-Basketball-Brand-32x32.jpg 32w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/Deer-Park-Stags-Basketball-Brand-48x48.jpg 48w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/Deer-Park-Stags-Basketball-Brand-80x80.jpg 80w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/Deer-Park-Stags-Basketball-Brand-180x180.jpg 180w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/Deer-Park-Stags-Basketball-Brand-600x600.jpg 600w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/Deer-Park-Stags-Basketball-Brand-100x100.jpg 100w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/Deer-Park-Stags-Basketball-Brand.jpg 1000w" sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 768px" /></div></a>
				<div class="elementor-post__text">
				<h2 class="elementor-post__title">
			<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2025/03/lady-stags-claim-3rd-state-tournament-win-over-prosser/" >
				Lady Stags Claim 3rd @ State Tournament Win Over Prosser			</a>
		</h2>
				<div class="elementor-post__excerpt">
			<p>The Deer Park High School Lady Stags secured a hard-fought 52-50 victory over the Prosser Mustangs to claim third place in the 2025 Washington State Girls Basketball Tournament. In a game filled with momentum swings, clutch performances, and late-game drama, Deer Park overcame a furious second-half rally from Prosser to finish their season on a high note.</p>
		</div>
		
		<a class="elementor-post__read-more" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2025/03/lady-stags-claim-3rd-state-tournament-win-over-prosser/" aria-label="Read more about Lady Stags Claim 3rd @ State Tournament Win Over Prosser" tabindex="-1" >
			Read More »		</a>

				</div>
				<div class="elementor-post__meta-data">
					<span class="elementor-post-author">
			T.V.S.		</span>
				<span class="elementor-post-date">
			March 13, 2025		</span>
				</div>
					</div>
		</article>

						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-1a22c52 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="1a22c52" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Garden</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-e7cba52 elementor-grid-1 elementor-posts__hover-none elementor-grid-tablet-2 elementor-grid-mobile-1 elementor-posts--thumbnail-top elementor-widget elementor-widget-posts" data-id="e7cba52" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-settings="{&quot;pagination_type&quot;:&quot;prev_next&quot;,&quot;cards_columns&quot;:&quot;1&quot;,&quot;cards_columns_tablet&quot;:&quot;2&quot;,&quot;cards_columns_mobile&quot;:&quot;1&quot;,&quot;cards_row_gap&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:35,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;cards_row_gap_tablet&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;cards_row_gap_mobile&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]}}" data-widget_type="posts.cards">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
							<div class="elementor-posts-container elementor-posts elementor-posts--skin-cards elementor-grid" role="list">
				<article class="elementor-post elementor-grid-item post-17077 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-featured category-garden tag-deer-park-municipal-code tag-nuisance-abatement authored-by-crystal-schut" role="listitem">
			<div class="elementor-post__card">
				<a class="elementor-post__thumbnail__link" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2023/07/the-lawn-arm-of-the-law/" tabindex="-1" ><div class="elementor-post__thumbnail"><img loading="lazy" width="768" height="576" src="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/grass_photoby_martinschut-768x576.jpg" class="attachment-medium_large size-medium_large wp-image-17080" alt="" decoding="async" srcset="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/grass_photoby_martinschut-768x576.jpg 768w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/grass_photoby_martinschut-300x225.jpg 300w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/grass_photoby_martinschut-1024x768.jpg 1024w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/grass_photoby_martinschut-240x180.jpg 240w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/grass_photoby_martinschut-1320x990.jpg 1320w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/grass_photoby_martinschut-600x450.jpg 600w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/grass_photoby_martinschut.jpg 1333w" sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 768px" /></div></a>
				<div class="elementor-post__text">
				<h2 class="elementor-post__title">
			<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2023/07/the-lawn-arm-of-the-law/" >
				The Lawn Arm Of The Law			</a>
		</h2>
				<div class="elementor-post__excerpt">
			<p>Did you know that there&#8217;s a secret code among grass blades? Yep, it&#8217;s true. Refrain from cutting your grass, it starts sending out signals to the neighborhood. So, people get out your ruler&#8217;s, grass or weeds over a certain height can get you a fine of hundreds of dollars.</p>
		</div>
		
		<a class="elementor-post__read-more" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2023/07/the-lawn-arm-of-the-law/" aria-label="Read more about The Lawn Arm Of The Law" tabindex="-1" >
			Read More »		</a>

				</div>
				<div class="elementor-post__meta-data">
					<span class="elementor-post-author">
			Crystal Schut		</span>
				<span class="elementor-post-date">
			July 5, 2023		</span>
				</div>
					</div>
		</article>
				</div>

						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-9090ef3 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="9090ef3" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Schools</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-05cb5af elementor-grid-1 elementor-posts__hover-none elementor-grid-tablet-2 elementor-grid-mobile-1 elementor-posts--thumbnail-top elementor-widget elementor-widget-posts" data-id="05cb5af" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-settings="{&quot;pagination_type&quot;:&quot;prev_next&quot;,&quot;cards_columns&quot;:&quot;1&quot;,&quot;cards_columns_tablet&quot;:&quot;2&quot;,&quot;cards_columns_mobile&quot;:&quot;1&quot;,&quot;cards_row_gap&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:35,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;cards_row_gap_tablet&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;cards_row_gap_mobile&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]}}" data-widget_type="posts.cards">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
							<div class="elementor-posts-container elementor-posts elementor-posts--skin-cards elementor-grid" role="list">
				<article class="elementor-post elementor-grid-item post-22674 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-featured category-schools tag-alexa-allman tag-caleb-krantz tag-city-of-deer-park tag-committee-to-support-deer-park-schools tag-deer-park-gazette tag-deer-park-school-district tag-public-disclosure-commission tag-richard-schut tag-tim-verzal authored-by-editorial-team" role="listitem">
			<div class="elementor-post__card">
				<a class="elementor-post__thumbnail__link" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2025/10/city-school-levy-under-investigation/" tabindex="-1" ><div class="elementor-post__thumbnail"><img loading="lazy" width="768" height="417" src="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/School-Levy-Flyer-City-Mailing-1000001190-768x417.jpg" class="attachment-medium_large size-medium_large wp-image-22676" alt="" decoding="async" srcset="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/School-Levy-Flyer-City-Mailing-1000001190-768x417.jpg 768w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/School-Levy-Flyer-City-Mailing-1000001190-300x163.jpg 300w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/School-Levy-Flyer-City-Mailing-1000001190-1024x557.jpg 1024w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/School-Levy-Flyer-City-Mailing-1000001190-1536x835.jpg 1536w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/School-Levy-Flyer-City-Mailing-1000001190-240x130.jpg 240w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/School-Levy-Flyer-City-Mailing-1000001190-600x326.jpg 600w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/School-Levy-Flyer-City-Mailing-1000001190.jpg 1840w" sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 768px" /></div></a>
				<div class="elementor-post__text">
				<h2 class="elementor-post__title">
			<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2025/10/city-school-levy-under-investigation/" >
				City &#038; School Levy Under Investigation			</a>
		</h2>
				<div class="elementor-post__excerpt">
			<p>A state investigation is officially underway into the City of Deer Park for the alleged illegal use of taxpayer resources to promote a $14.6 million school levy. At the center of the probe is a potential conflict of interest, as the School District&#8217;s plans to purchase city-owned land in the near future hinge on the levy&#8217;s passage.</p>
		</div>
		
		<a class="elementor-post__read-more" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2025/10/city-school-levy-under-investigation/" aria-label="Read more about City &#038; School Levy Under Investigation" tabindex="-1" >
			Read More »		</a>

				</div>
				<div class="elementor-post__meta-data">
					<span class="elementor-post-author">
			Editorial Team		</span>
				<span class="elementor-post-date">
			October 20, 2025		</span>
				</div>
					</div>
		</article>
				</div>
		
				<div class="e-load-more-anchor" data-page="1" data-max-page="169" data-next-page="https://news.dpgazette.com/page/2/"></div>

				<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-33 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-ad614a7" data-id="ad614a7" data-element_type="column" data-e-type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-af48540 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="af48540" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Technology</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-0bf7601 elementor-grid-1 elementor-posts__hover-none elementor-grid-tablet-2 elementor-grid-mobile-1 elementor-posts--thumbnail-top elementor-widget elementor-widget-posts" data-id="0bf7601" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-settings="{&quot;pagination_type&quot;:&quot;prev_next&quot;,&quot;cards_columns&quot;:&quot;1&quot;,&quot;cards_columns_tablet&quot;:&quot;2&quot;,&quot;cards_columns_mobile&quot;:&quot;1&quot;,&quot;cards_row_gap&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:35,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;cards_row_gap_tablet&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]},&quot;cards_row_gap_mobile&quot;:{&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;sizes&quot;:[]}}" data-widget_type="posts.cards">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
							<div class="elementor-posts-container elementor-posts elementor-posts--skin-cards elementor-grid" role="list">
				<article class="elementor-post elementor-grid-item post-20102 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-featured category-technology tag-apple-app tag-city-hall tag-city-of-deer-park tag-deer-park-connect tag-deer-park-municipal-code tag-google-play authored-by-crystal-schut" role="listitem">
			<div class="elementor-post__card">
				<a class="elementor-post__thumbnail__link" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2024/09/deer-park-connect-app-stay-informed-and-engaged/" tabindex="-1" ><div class="elementor-post__thumbnail"><img loading="lazy" width="768" height="603" src="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/City-Hall-1911-first-DP-HS2-768x603.jpg" class="attachment-medium_large size-medium_large wp-image-3716" alt="" decoding="async" srcset="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/City-Hall-1911-first-DP-HS2-768x603.jpg 768w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/City-Hall-1911-first-DP-HS2-600x471.jpg 600w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/City-Hall-1911-first-DP-HS2-300x236.jpg 300w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/City-Hall-1911-first-DP-HS2-229x180.jpg 229w, https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/City-Hall-1911-first-DP-HS2.jpg 1000w" sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 768px" /></div></a>
				<div class="elementor-post__text">
				<h2 class="elementor-post__title">
			<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2024/09/deer-park-connect-app-stay-informed-and-engaged/" >
				Deer Park Connect App: Stay Informed And Engaged			</a>
		</h2>
				<div class="elementor-post__excerpt">
			<p>The launch of the City of Deer Park’s app provides residents with a new tool for improved communication and engagement with local government services. The app offers ways to streamline access to essential information. Links to download the app are included in this article.</p>
		</div>
		
		<a class="elementor-post__read-more" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2024/09/deer-park-connect-app-stay-informed-and-engaged/" aria-label="Read more about Deer Park Connect App: Stay Informed And Engaged" tabindex="-1" >
			Read More »		</a>

				</div>
				<div class="elementor-post__meta-data">
					<span class="elementor-post-author">
			Crystal Schut		</span>
				<span class="elementor-post-date">
			September 5, 2024		</span>
				</div>
					</div>
		</article>
				</div>
		
				<div class="e-load-more-anchor" data-page="1" data-max-page="32" data-next-page="https://news.dpgazette.com/page/2/"></div>

			<span class="page-numbers prev">&laquo; Previous</span>

						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-cfb9f38" data-id="cfb9f38" data-element_type="column" data-e-type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-6d4be67 elementor-widget elementor-widget-theme-post-content" data-id="6d4be67" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="theme-post-content.default">

					<p><a rel="bookmark" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/?p=269"><br />
April 15, 2018<br />
</a></p>
<h2 class="entry-title" itemprop="headline">
 <a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/?p=269">Cougar Spotted In Deer Park Area</a></h2>
<p><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/?p=269" class="post-thumbnail fw-block-image-child fw-ratio-16-9 fw-ratio-container"><br />
<img decoding="async" src="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/04/Cougar_gamecam_print.png" alt="Cougar Caught on Game Camera" data-maxdpr="1.7" class="attachment-post-thumbnail lazyload"><br />
</a><br />
<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/featured/" rel="tag">Featured</a><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/news/" rel="tag">Local News</a><br />
By <a rel="author" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/author/trecpro/">TRECpro</a><br />
<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/?p=269" class="fw-btn-post-read-more-blog fw-btn fw-btn-md fw-btn-1" style=""><br />

</a><br />

April 12, 2018<br />
</a></p>
<h2 class="entry-title" itemprop="headline">
 <a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/04/six-word-stories-april-2018/">Six Word Stories April 2018</a></h2>
<p><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/news/arts-entertainment/" rel="tag">Arts &amp; Entertainment</a><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/featured/" rel="tag">Featured</a></p>
<p>By now I hope you are familiar with our writing prompt for six word stories. Our last prompt was “When Time Stands Still”; here are some of our favorites. OUR TOP SIX RESPONSES IN RANDOM ORDER • If only it would last longer. – Tristan C • With the final push, baby arrived. – Sarah […]</p>
<p>By <a rel="author" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/author/boobam/">Ellie Chambers</a><br />
<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/04/six-word-stories-april-2018/" class="fw-btn-post-read-more-blog fw-btn fw-btn-md fw-btn-1" style=""><br />

</a><br />

April 11, 2018<br />
</a></p>
<h2 class="entry-title" itemprop="headline">
 <a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/04/springdale-shooting-threat/">Springdale Shooting Threat</a></h2>
<p><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/featured/" rel="tag">Featured</a><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/news/" rel="tag">Local News</a></p>
<p>On the evening of March 21, the Stevens County Sheriff’s Office was requested to assist in the investigation of a possible threat of a school shooting that allegedly was going to take place on the 22nd at Mary Walker High School in Springdale, WA. Information was spread via Snapchat and other social media that there […]</p>
<p>By <a rel="author" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/author/edteam/">Editorial Team</a><br />
<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/04/springdale-shooting-threat/" class="fw-btn-post-read-more-blog fw-btn fw-btn-md fw-btn-1" style=""><br />
Read More<br />
</a><br />

April 10, 2018<br />
</a></p>
<h2 class="entry-title" itemprop="headline">
 <a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/04/car-prowling-and-theft/">Car Prowling and Theft</a></h2>
<p><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/04/car-prowling-and-theft/" class="post-thumbnail fw-block-image-child fw-ratio-16-9 fw-ratio-container"><br />
<img decoding="async" src="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/04/29497062_10210792316115141_2760019346745982976_n-1.png" alt="" data-maxdpr="1.7" class="attachment-post-thumbnail lazyload"><br />
</a><br />
<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/featured/" rel="tag">Featured</a><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/news/" rel="tag">Local News</a></p>
<p>On the evening of March 18th and into the early morning hours of the 19th, &nbsp;Deer Park was subjected to a spree of car prowlings. A group of 3 suspects was responsible for multiple car break-ins; items were rummaged and stolen. Most of the criminal behavior occurred in a small area in the northeast part […]</p>
<p>By <a rel="author" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/author/edteam/">Editorial Team</a><br />
<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/04/car-prowling-and-theft/" class="fw-btn-post-read-more-blog fw-btn fw-btn-md fw-btn-1" style=""><br />

</a><br />

April 10, 2018<br />
</a></p>
<h2 class="entry-title" itemprop="headline">
 <a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/04/shear-salon-and-spa-has-a-new-location/">Shear Salon and Spa Has A New Location</a></h2>
<p><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/04/shear-salon-and-spa-has-a-new-location/" class="post-thumbnail fw-block-image-child fw-ratio-16-9 fw-ratio-container"><br />
<img decoding="async" src="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/04/28619303_1963122753905531_8907173335570542429_o.jpg" alt="Shear Salon and Spa" data-maxdpr="1.7" class="attachment-post-thumbnail lazyload"><br />
</a><br />
<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/news/business/" rel="tag">Business</a><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/featured/" rel="tag">Featured</a></p>
<p>Shear Salon and Spa has recently moved to a new location on Crawford Street. &nbsp;The crew at the salon is now enjoying a larger off-the-street parking area and more space inside to serve their clients. To celebrate their new location, the Shear Salon family is hosting an open house from 2pm to 5pm on Saturday […]</p>
<p>By <a rel="author" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/author/edteam/">Editorial Team</a><br />
<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/04/shear-salon-and-spa-has-a-new-location/" class="fw-btn-post-read-more-blog fw-btn fw-btn-md fw-btn-1" style=""><br />

<h2 class="entry-title" itemprop="headline">
 <a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/04/junior-contributors-march-2018/">Junior Contributors! March 2018</a></h2>
<p><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/news/arts-entertainment/" rel="tag">Arts &amp; Entertainment</a><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/featured/" rel="tag">Featured</a></p><div  class="dpgaz-0058d0b4a22326707073a8e0fe307bec dpgaz-leaderboard" id="dpgaz-0058d0b4a22326707073a8e0fe307bec"></div>
<p>March Theme:&nbsp;Signs Of Spring. Nesting Quail By Aidan age 13 Bunnies in Sunnies By Gerrit age 10 It’s Easter and the bunnies are having a race, or how they say it in Dr. Seuss Land: Buns have fun in the sun on Sunday. They run the Funny Bunny Race, and have hot cross buns. Then […]</p>
<p>By <a rel="author" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/author/edteam/">Editorial Team</a><br />

<h2 class="entry-title" itemprop="headline">
 <a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/04/studded-tire-extension/">Studded Tire Removal Date Extension</a></h2>
<p><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/04/studded-tire-extension/" class="post-thumbnail fw-block-image-child fw-ratio-16-9 fw-ratio-container"><br />
<img decoding="async" src="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/04/old-tires.jpg" alt="Pile of old tires." data-maxdpr="1.7" class="attachment-post-thumbnail lazyload"><br />
</a><br />
<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/featured/" rel="tag">Featured</a><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/news/" rel="tag">Local News</a></p>
<p>March 21st, the first day of spring, was filled with sunshine and the hope of warmer weather on the horizon. &nbsp;&nbsp;March 24th it snowed three plus inches and left Deer Park and surrounding areas covered in a blanket of heavy snow and slush. I could blame specific individuals who had already taken off their snow […]</p>
<p>By <a rel="author" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/author/boobam/">Ellie Chambers</a><br />
<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/04/studded-tire-extension/" class="fw-btn-post-read-more-blog fw-btn fw-btn-md fw-btn-1" style=""><br />

<h2 class="entry-title" itemprop="headline">
 <a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/04/rotary-student-of-the-month-march-2018/">Rotary Student Of The Month March 2018</a></h2>
<p><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/04/rotary-student-of-the-month-march-2018/" class="post-thumbnail fw-block-image-child fw-ratio-16-9 fw-ratio-container"><br />
<img decoding="async" src="https://news.dpgazette.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/March_Students_of_the_Month.jpeg" alt="March_Students_of_the_Month" data-maxdpr="1.7" class="attachment-post-thumbnail lazyload"><br />
</a><br />
<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/featured/" rel="tag">Featured</a><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/news/" rel="tag">Local News</a></p>
<p>Congratulations to Deer Park Rotary’s March Students of the Month! Riverside’s Tom McNamee has managed the girls soccer and basketball varsity teams, the boys soccer team and for 2 years announced Riverside’s volleyball games. Tom has taken every science course offered at Riverside except computer science and his favorite is biomedical science. His other subjects […]</p>
<p>By <a rel="author" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/author/release/">Press Release</a><br />
<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/04/rotary-student-of-the-month-march-2018/" class="fw-btn-post-read-more-blog fw-btn fw-btn-md fw-btn-1" style=""><br />
Read More<br />
</a><br />

April 2, 2018<br />
</a></p>
<h2 class="entry-title" itemprop="headline">
 <a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/04/deer-park-gazette-website/">New Deer Park Gazette Website</a></h2>
<p><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/featured/" rel="tag">Featured</a><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/news/" rel="tag">Local News</a></p>
<p>Hot off the presses, the new Deer Park Gazette website! The website will feature current local news articles covering a range of topics, from sports to business and more. Articles in the printed paper will occasionally contain a website address that will lead you to more information related to that article. &nbsp;These will sometimes link […]</p>
<p>By <a rel="author" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/author/trecpro/">TRECpro</a><br />
<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/04/deer-park-gazette-website/" class="fw-btn-post-read-more-blog fw-btn fw-btn-md fw-btn-1" style=""><br />
Read More<br />
</a><br />
<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/04/deer-park-gazette-website/#comments" class="comments-link fw-comment-link-type-1">0</a><br />
<a rel="bookmark" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/02/riverside-school-district-levies/"><br />
February 28, 2018<br />
</a></p>
<h2 class="entry-title" itemprop="headline">
 <a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/02/riverside-school-district-levies/">Riverside School District Levies</a></h2>
<p><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/featured/" rel="tag">Featured</a><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/news/opinion/letters-to-the-editor/" rel="tag">Letters To The Editor</a></p>
<p>Dear Editor and Elk, Chattaroy, and Riverside Community Members, My name is Daniel, and I am a graduate of Riverside High School. I was enrolled in Riverside School District for thirteen years. Although I’ve moved twice since I graduated in 2013, Chattaroy is, and always will be, my home. Attending Riverside was an essential part […]</p>
<p>By <a rel="author" href="https://news.dpgazette.com/author/boobam/">Ellie Chambers</a><br />
<a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/2018/02/riverside-school-district-levies/" class="fw-btn-post-read-more-blog fw-btn fw-btn-md fw-btn-1" style=""><br />
Read More<br />
</a><br />

				<ul id="menu-1-9bfd44d" class="elementor-nav-menu"><li class="menu-item menu-item-type-taxonomy menu-item-object-category menu-item-has-children menu-item-62"><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/news/" class="elementor-item">News</a>
<ul class="sub-menu elementor-nav-menu--dropdown">
	<li class="menu-item menu-item-type-taxonomy menu-item-object-category menu-item-63"><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/news/" class="elementor-sub-item">Local News</a></li>
	<li class="menu-item menu-item-type-taxonomy menu-item-object-category menu-item-2849"><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/news/community/" class="elementor-sub-item">Community</a></li>

	<li class="menu-item menu-item-type-taxonomy menu-item-object-category menu-item-19"><a href="https://news.dpgazette.com/category/news/business/" class="elementor-sub-item">Business</a></li>

	:class="itemClasses"

		class="jet-mobile-menu__item-inner"
		tabindex="0"

<script>
  var _paq = window._paq = window._paq || [];
  /* tracker methods like "setCustomDimension" should be called before "trackPageView" */
  _paq.push(["setCookieDomain", "*.news.dpgazette.com"]);
  _paq.push(["setDomains", ["*.news.dpgazette.com","*.dpgazette.com","*.news.dpgazette.com","*.dpgazette.com"]]);
  _paq.push(["enableCrossDomainLinking"]);
  _paq.push(['trackPageView']);
_paq.push(['trackVisibleContentImpressions']);
  _paq.push(['enableLinkTracking']);
  (function() {
    var u="https://stats.trecpro.com/";
    _paq.push(['setTrackerUrl', u+'piwik.php']);
    _paq.push(['setSiteId', '31']);
    var d=document, g=d.createElement('script'), s=d.getElementsByTagName('script')[0];
    g.async=true; g.src=u+'piwik.js'; s.parentNode.insertBefore(g,s);
  })();
</script>

			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

		(function () {
			var c = document.body.className;
			c = c.replace(/woocommerce-no-js/, 'woocommerce-js');
			document.body.className = c;
		})();
	</script>
